name: jaz-ai
description: Give Claude full access to Jaz accounting. Create invoices, record bills, reconcile banks, close books, compute taxes, and generate reports. 241 tools, 13 IFRS calculators, 12 job blueprints, complete API coverage. Agents do real accounting work, autonomously and correctly.
long_description:
Complete agent stack for Jaz accounting.

**241 tools**: invoices, bills, credit notes, journals, cash entries, contacts, items, chart of accounts, bank reconciliation, reports, attachments, payments, currency management, and more.

**13 financial calculators**: loan amortization, depreciation (SL/DDB/SYD), IFRS 16 leases, hire purchase, fixed deposits, asset disposal, FX revaluation, ECL provisioning, IAS 37 provisions, prepaid amortization. Each outputs journal entries, workings, and execution blueprints.

**12 job blueprints**: month/quarter/year-end close, bank recon, document collection, GST/VAT filing, payment runs, credit control, supplier recon, audit prep, FA review, Singapore Form C-S tax computation.

**117 API rules**: field mapping, error catalog, endpoint catalog, and production gotchas so agents work with Jaz correctly on the first try.

Offline tools (calculators, job blueprints) work without an API key. API tools connect directly to Jaz with no intermediary servers.

api_key.title: Jaz API Key
api_key.description: Your Jaz API key (get one from Settings > API in the Jaz app). Offline tools (calculators, job blueprints) work without a key.

tools.name: get_organization
tools.description: Get organization details (name, currency, country, lock date, fiscal year end).

tools.name: list_accounts
tools.description: List chart of accounts. Returns account name, code, type, class, status. Paginated — response includes totalElements. Use limit/offset to page.

tools.name: search_accounts
tools.description: Search chart of accounts by name or code. Returns up to 100 by default. Use limit/offset to page through large result sets.

tools.name: create_account
tools.description: Create a new chart of accounts entry. Auto-checks for duplicates by name — returns existing account if found. Code must be unique. Account class is inferred from accountType.

tools.name: update_account
tools.description: Update an existing chart of accounts entry (name or code).

tools.name: list_contacts
tools.description: List contacts (customers/suppliers). Returns billingName, name, emails, status. Paginated — response includes totalElements. Use limit/offset to page.

tools.name: search_contacts
tools.description: Search contacts with filters. Searches both billingName and name fields when query is provided.

tools.name: get_contact
tools.description: Get full contact details by resourceId.

tools.name: create_contact
tools.description: Create a new contact. Auto-checks for duplicates by name — returns existing contact if found instead of creating a duplicate.

tools.name: update_contact
tools.description: Update an existing contact. Fetches current data first so you only need to send changed fields.

tools.name: list_invoices
tools.description: List invoices. Returns reference, date, status, contact, totalAmount. Paginated — response includes totalElements. Use limit/offset to page.

tools.name: search_invoices
tools.description: Search invoices with filters. Provide any combination: reference, contact, status, date range, due date range, amount range, tag, currency.

tools.name: get_invoice
tools.description: Get full invoice details including line items, payments, totals.

tools.name: create_invoice
tools.description:
Create a new invoice. IMPORTANT:
- Line items use "name" (not "description") for the item label.
- saveAsDraft defaults to true. Set to false only if user says "finalize".
- accountResourceId is REQUIRED on each lineItem for finalized invoices. Search accounts first (e.g. Operating Revenue).
- Currency format: { sourceCurrency: "USD", exchangeRate: 1.35 }
- contactResourceId is required — search contacts first to get the ID.
- Dates must be YYYY-MM-DD format.
- reference MUST be unique per org — if the user doesn't specify one, generate one with a timestamp (e.g., INV-20260309-1430). Duplicates cause 422.

tools.name: update_invoice
tools.description: Update an existing draft invoice (change reference, dates, line items, notes, custom fields). Use when the user says "update", "change", "fix", or "correct" a draft invoice. Line items CAN be fully replaced — pass the complete updated lineItems array.

tools.name: delete_invoice
tools.description: Delete a draft invoice. Cannot delete finalized invoices.

tools.name: pay_invoice
tools.description: Record a payment against an invoice. Invoice must be APPROVED/UNPAID before payment — draft or voided invoices cannot be paid. If the invoice is still a DRAFT, call finalize_invoice first.

tools.name: finalize_invoice
tools.description: Finalize a draft invoice (set saveAsDraft=false). Can optionally update fields in the same call. IMPORTANT: Every lineItem MUST have accountResourceId. If the draft was created without it, pass lineItems with accountResourceId added (search accounts first, e.g. Operating Revenue for sales).

tools.name: apply_credits_to_invoice
tools.description:
Apply customer credit note(s) to an invoice. You MUST call this tool to actually apply credits — do not just describe the steps.
Steps: 1) search_customer_credit_notes with status UNAPPLIED for the same contact. 2) If CN is still DRAFT, call finalize_customer_credit_note first. 3) Call this tool with creditNoteResourceId and amountApplied for each CN.

tools.name: download_invoice_pdf
tools.description: Download an invoice as PDF. Returns { fileUrl }.

tools.name: list_bills
tools.description: List bills (purchase invoices). Returns reference, date, status, contact, amounts. Paginated — response includes totalElements. Use limit/offset to page.

tools.name: search_bills
tools.description: Search bills with filters. Provide any combination: reference, contact, status, date range, due date range, amount range, tag, currency.

tools.name: get_bill
tools.description: Get full bill details.

tools.name: create_bill
tools.description: Create a new bill. Same rules as create_invoice: name not description, saveAsDraft defaults true, accountResourceId REQUIRED on lineItems for finalized bills (search accounts first, e.g. Operating Expense). When selecting a tax profile, use search_tax_profiles with appliesTo "purchase" — sales-only profiles cause 422. reference MUST be unique — generate one with a timestamp if user doesn't specify.

tools.name: update_bill
tools.description: Update an existing draft bill (change reference, dates, line items, notes, custom fields). Use when the user says "update", "change", "fix", or "correct" a draft bill. Line items CAN be fully replaced — pass the complete updated lineItems array.

tools.name: delete_bill
tools.description: Delete a draft bill.

tools.name: pay_bill
tools.description: Record a payment against a bill. Bill must be APPROVED before payment — draft or voided bills cannot be paid.

tools.name: finalize_bill
tools.description: Finalize a draft bill (set saveAsDraft=false). Can optionally update fields in the same call. IMPORTANT: Every lineItem MUST have accountResourceId. If the draft was created without it, pass lineItems with accountResourceId added (search accounts first, e.g. Operating Expense for purchases).

tools.name: apply_credits_to_bill
tools.description: Apply supplier credit note(s) to a bill. IMPORTANT: The credit note must be FINALIZED first (status UNAPPLIED, not DRAFT). If it is still a draft, call finalize_supplier_credit_note first. Then search_supplier_credit_notes with status UNAPPLIED to find available credits for the contact, and pass creditNoteResourceId and amountApplied for each.

tools.name: list_journals
tools.description: List journal entries. Paginated — response includes totalElements. Use limit/offset to page.

tools.name: get_journal
tools.description: Get full journal entry details by resourceId. Returns journal lines, amounts, status, and metadata.

tools.name: search_journals
tools.description: Search journals with filters. Provide any combination: reference, status, tag, type, date range.

tools.name: create_journal
tools.description:
Create a journal entry. IMPORTANT:
- Each entry needs accountResourceId, type (DEBIT or CREDIT), and amount.
- Total debits MUST equal total credits — the API rejects unbalanced journals.
- Search accounts first to get the correct resourceIds.
- Double-check your math: sum all DEBIT amounts and all CREDIT amounts — they must be equal.

tools.name: create_transfer_trial_balance
tools.description:
Create opening balance entries (Transfer Trial Balance). Used to set up initial account balances when migrating to a new accounting system.
- Always created as ACTIVE — no draft mode.
- Reference is auto-generated ("Transfer Trial Balance") — do NOT send a reference.
- Minimum 1 entry (unlike regular journals which require 2).
- Each entry needs accountResourceId, type (DEBIT or CREDIT), and amount (must be > 0).
- Skips lock date validation (opening balances are special).
- Uses journalEntries (NOT lines — this is a journal type).

tools.name: delete_journal
tools.description: Delete a draft journal entry.

tools.name: generate_trial_balance
tools.description: Generate a trial balance report.

tools.name: generate_balance_sheet
tools.description: Generate a balance sheet report.

tools.name: generate_profit_and_loss
tools.description: Generate a profit & loss (income statement) report.

tools.name: generate_cashflow
tools.description: Generate a cashflow report.

tools.name: generate_aged_ar
tools.description: Generate aged accounts receivable summary.

tools.name: generate_aged_ap
tools.description: Generate aged accounts payable summary.

tools.name: generate_cash_balance
tools.description: Generate a cash balance report showing cash position at a specific date. PREFERRED for cash position questions — use this (NOT balance sheet) when asked about total cash, cash on hand, available cash, or cash position across all bank accounts.

tools.name: generate_general_ledger
tools.description: Generate a general ledger report.

tools.name: list_bank_accounts
tools.description: List bank accounts connected to the organization.

tools.name: list_items
tools.description: List items (products & services). Returns internalName, itemCode, appliesToSale/Purchase. Paginated — response includes totalElements. Use limit/offset to page.

tools.name: search_items
tools.description: Search items with filters. IMPORTANT: Cannot search by name — internalName is NOT a filter field. Use list_items and scan results to find items by name. Supported filters: appliesToSale, appliesToPurchase, status, itemCategory.

tools.name: get_item
tools.description: Get full item details by resourceId.

tools.name: create_item
tools.description:
Create a new item. Auto-checks for duplicates by itemCode — returns existing item if found.
- saleItemName/purchaseItemName are auto-set from internalName if not provided.
- Set appliesToSale and/or appliesToPurchase to control where the item can be used.

tools.name: update_item
tools.description: Update an existing item. Only send fields you want to change — required fields are auto-merged from current state.

tools.name: delete_item
tools.description: Delete an item.

tools.name: list_tags
tools.description: List tags used for transaction categorization. Paginated — response includes totalElements. Use limit/offset to page.

tools.name: search_tags
tools.description: Search tags by name. Returns up to 100 by default. Use limit/offset to page through large result sets.

tools.name: create_tag
tools.description: Create a new tag. Automatically reuses existing tag if one with the same name exists.

tools.name: get_tag
tools.description: Get a tag by resourceId.

tools.name: update_tag
tools.description: Rename a tag.

tools.name: delete_tag
tools.description: Delete a tag.

tools.name: list_capsule_types
tools.description: List capsule types (e.g., PREPAID_EXPENSE, DEFERRED_REVENUE). Use to get capsuleTypeResourceId before creating capsules.

tools.name: list_capsules
tools.description: List capsules (transaction groupings for amortization, deferred revenue, etc.). Paginated — response includes totalElements. Use limit/offset to page.

tools.name: search_capsules
tools.description: Search capsules by title. Returns up to 100 by default. Use limit/offset to page through large result sets.

tools.name: get_capsule
tools.description: Get full capsule details by resourceId.

tools.name: create_capsule
tools.description: Create a new capsule. List capsule types first to get the capsuleTypeResourceId.

tools.name: update_capsule
tools.description: Update a capsule title or description. Required fields are auto-merged from current state.

tools.name: delete_capsule
tools.description: Delete a capsule.

tools.name: list_customer_credit_notes
tools.description: List customer credit notes (AR adjustments/refunds). Paginated — response includes totalElements. Use limit/offset to page.

tools.name: search_customer_credit_notes
tools.description: Search customer credit notes by reference, status, or contact. Returns up to 100 by default. Use limit/offset to page through large result sets.

tools.name: get_customer_credit_note
tools.description: Get full customer credit note details including line items.

tools.name: create_customer_credit_note
tools.description:
Create a customer credit note. Saves as draft by default.
- Status when finalized is UNAPPLIED (not APPROVED).
- Line items use "name" for item description.
- contactResourceId required — search contacts first.
- reference MUST be unique — generate one with a timestamp if user doesn't specify.

tools.name: delete_customer_credit_note
tools.description: Delete a draft customer credit note.

tools.name: update_customer_credit_note
tools.description: Update a draft customer credit note (change amount, line items, contact, date, notes). Use when the user says "update", "change", "fix", or "correct" a credit note.

tools.name: finalize_customer_credit_note
tools.description: Finalize a draft customer credit note (set saveAsDraft=false). Status becomes UNAPPLIED.

tools.name: create_customer_credit_note_refund
tools.description: Record a refund payment against a customer credit note.

tools.name: list_customer_credit_note_refunds
tools.description: List refund payments for a customer credit note.

tools.name: list_supplier_credit_notes
tools.description: List supplier credit notes (AP adjustments/refunds). Paginated — response includes totalElements. Use limit/offset to page.

tools.name: search_supplier_credit_notes
tools.description: Search supplier credit notes by reference, status, or contact. Returns up to 100 by default. Use limit/offset to page through large result sets.

tools.name: get_supplier_credit_note
tools.description: Get full supplier credit note details including line items.

tools.name: create_supplier_credit_note
tools.description:
Create a supplier credit note. Saves as draft by default.
- Status when finalized is UNAPPLIED (not APPROVED).
- Line items use "name" for item description.
- contactResourceId required — search contacts first.

tools.name: delete_supplier_credit_note
tools.description: Delete a draft supplier credit note.

tools.name: update_supplier_credit_note
tools.description: Update a draft supplier credit note (change amount, line items, contact, date, notes). Use when the user says "update", "change", "fix", or "correct" a credit note.

tools.name: finalize_supplier_credit_note
tools.description: Finalize a draft supplier credit note (set saveAsDraft=false). Status becomes UNAPPLIED.

tools.name: create_supplier_credit_note_refund
tools.description: Record a refund payment against a supplier credit note.

tools.name: list_supplier_credit_note_refunds
tools.description: List refund payments for a supplier credit note.

tools.name: list_currencies
tools.description: List currencies enabled for the organization. Returns currency code, name, symbol, and whether it is the base currency.

tools.name: add_currency
tools.description: Enable one or more currencies for the organization.

tools.name: list_currency_rates
tools.description: List exchange rates for a specific currency. IMPORTANT: You MUST call list_currencies first to discover which currencies the org has enabled — never guess or assume currency codes.

tools.name: add_currency_rate
tools.description: Add or set an exchange rate for a currency. ALWAYS use this tool even when the user says "update rate" — it handles both new and existing rates. Rate is relative to the base currency. Call list_currencies first to get valid currency codes.

tools.name: update_currency_rate
tools.description: Update an EXISTING exchange rate record by its resourceId. Requires the rate resourceId from list_currency_rates. WARNING: If the user says "update the rate" or "set the rate", they almost always mean add_currency_rate (which creates/overwrites for a date). Only use this tool when explicitly modifying an existing rate record by ID.

tools.name: start_currency_rates_import_job
tools.description: Start an async job to import currency rates from a CSV file URL.

tools.name: get_currency_rates_import_job_status
tools.description: Check the status of a currency rates import job.

tools.name: list_tax_profiles
tools.description: List tax profiles (GST, VAT, etc.). Returns name, rate, tax type.

tools.name: list_tax_types
tools.description: List available tax types. Use the tax type code when creating tax profiles.

tools.name: create_tax_profile
tools.description: Create a new tax profile. List tax types first to get the taxTypeCode. Automatically checks for duplicates by name — returns existing profile if found.

tools.name: list_cash_in
tools.description: List cash-in entries (direct cash receipts). Paginated.

tools.name: create_cash_in
tools.description:
Record money received INTO a bank account from an EXTERNAL source (customer payment, refund received, deposit from outside).
WHEN TO USE: customer payments received, refunds from suppliers, insurance payouts, external deposits.
WHEN NOT TO USE: moving money between your own bank/cash accounts — use create_cash_transfer instead.
- CRITICAL: accountResourceId MUST be a Bank/Cash account from list_bank_accounts output. Using expense, revenue, or liability accounts will fail. Always call list_bank_accounts first to find valid accounts.
- lines are the offsetting entries. Each needs accountResourceId, type (DEBIT/CREDIT), and amount. IMPORTANT: offset accounts must be regular P&L or balance sheet accounts (expense, revenue, asset, liability) — NOT bank/cash accounts or controlled accounts (AR/AP). Example: Service Revenue, Interest Income, Other Income.
- The API enforces account separation: cash-in bank account cannot appear in lines.

tools.name: list_cash_out
tools.description: List cash-out entries (direct cash disbursements). Paginated.

tools.name: create_cash_out
tools.description:
Record money paid OUT FROM a bank account to an EXTERNAL party (expense, supplier payment, reimbursement, withdrawal).
WHEN TO USE: expenses paid, supplier payments, reimbursements, withdrawals to external parties.
WHEN NOT TO USE: moving money between your own bank/cash accounts — use create_cash_transfer instead.
- CRITICAL: accountResourceId MUST be a Bank/Cash account from list_bank_accounts output. Using expense, revenue, or liability accounts will fail with "CashOut journal account cannot be in CashIn Entries". Always call list_bank_accounts first to find valid accounts.
- lines are the offsetting entries. Each needs accountResourceId, type (DEBIT for cash-out expenses), and amount (must be > 0). For cash-out: use type "DEBIT" on the expense/offset account. IMPORTANT: offset accounts must be regular P&L or balance sheet accounts (expense, revenue, asset, liability) — NOT bank/cash accounts or controlled accounts (AR/AP). Example: { accountResourceId: "<expense-acct-id>", type: "DEBIT", amount: 100 }.
- The API enforces account separation: cash-out bank account cannot appear in lines.

tools.name: get_cash_in
tools.description: Get a cash-in entry by resourceId.

tools.name: update_cash_in
tools.description: Update an existing cash-in entry (change amount, date, reference, notes, tags, or entry lines). Use when the user says "update", "change", "fix", or "adjust" a cash-in that was just created or found. Do NOT create a new entry — use this tool instead. NOTE: cash entries created without saveAsDraft:true are ACTIVE (finalized) and cannot be updated — they must be deleted and recreated.

tools.name: get_cash_out
tools.description: Get a cash-out entry by resourceId.

tools.name: update_cash_out
tools.description: Update an existing cash-out entry (change amount, date, reference, notes, tags, or entry lines). Use when the user says "update", "change", "fix", or "adjust" a cash-out that was just created or found. Do NOT create a new entry — use this tool instead. NOTE: cash entries created without saveAsDraft:true are ACTIVE (finalized) and cannot be updated — they must be deleted and recreated.

tools.name: list_cash_transfers
tools.description: List cash transfer entries. Paginated.

tools.name: create_cash_transfer
tools.description:
Move money between two of YOUR OWN bank/cash accounts (internal transfer, e.g., main bank to petty cash, USD account to SGD account).
WHEN TO USE: petty cash top-ups from bank, inter-account transfers, currency conversions between own accounts.
WHEN NOT TO USE: receiving money from external parties (use create_cash_in) or paying external parties (use create_cash_out).
- cashOut = source account (money leaves), cashIn = destination account (money arrives).
- Each side needs accountResourceId + amount.
- reference is auto-generated if not provided.
- Do NOT send currency/exchangeRate — derived server-side from bank account currencies.

tools.name: delete_cash_in
tools.description: Delete (void) a cash-in entry. Uses parentEntityResourceId from create response.

tools.name: delete_cash_out
tools.description: Delete (void) a cash-out entry. Uses parentEntityResourceId from create response.

tools.name: delete_cash_transfer
tools.description: Delete (void) a cash transfer. Uses parentEntityResourceId from create response.

tools.name: list_scheduled_invoices
tools.description: List scheduled (recurring) invoices. Paginated.

tools.name: list_scheduled_bills
tools.description: List scheduled (recurring) bills. Paginated.

tools.name: list_scheduled_journals
tools.description: List scheduled (recurring) journals. Paginated.

tools.name: get_bank_account
tools.description: Get full bank account details by resourceId.

tools.name: search_bank_records
tools.description: Search bank records (imported bank transactions) for a specific account. Use this to find unreconciled items, match deposits to invoices, or identify bank charges. For duplicate detection, also cross-reference with search_cashflow_transactions to check if matching payments/cash entries exist. Filter by status (UNRECONCILED/RECONCILED/POSSIBLE_DUPLICATE), date range, description, payer/payee, reference, and amount range. Call list_bank_accounts first to get the accountResourceId.

tools.name: search_cashflow_transactions
tools.description: Search cashflow transactions (unified ledger: invoices, bills, credit notes, journals, payments). Useful for reconciliation.

tools.name: list_bookmarks
tools.description: List organization bookmarks (saved values/settings).

tools.name: get_bookmark
tools.description: Get a bookmark by resourceId.

tools.name: create_bookmarks
tools.description: Create one or more bookmarks. categoryCode must be one of: AUDIT_AND_ASSURANCE, BANKING_AND_FINANCE, BUDGETS_AND_CONTROLS, EMPLOYEES_AND_PAYROLL, EXTERNAL_DOCUMENTS, GENERAL_INFORMATION, OWNERS_AND_DIRECTORS, TAXATION_AND_COMPLIANCE, WORKFLOWS_AND_PROCESSES.

tools.name: update_bookmark
tools.description: Update an existing bookmark (name, value, or category). Use when modifying a previously created bookmark.

tools.name: list_org_users
tools.description: List organization users (team members). Returns name, email, roles.

tools.name: search_org_users
tools.description: Search organization users by name or email.

tools.name: invite_org_user
tools.description: Invite a new user to the organization.

tools.name: update_org_user
tools.description: Update an organization user's module roles.

tools.name: remove_org_user
tools.description: Remove a user from the organization.

tools.name: list_payments
tools.description: List recent payments across all transaction types. Paginated.

tools.name: search_payments
tools.description: Search payments with filters (date, type, direction, reference, account).

tools.name: download_export
tools.description:
Download a data export report. Returns { fileName, fileUrl }.
Available export types: trial-balance, balance-sheet, profit-and-loss, general-ledger, cashflow, cash-balance, ar-report, ap-report, sales-summary, sales-payments-summary, purchase-summary, purchase-payments-summary, customer-revenue-summary, product-sales-summary, periodic-revenue-summary, supplier-expense-summary, product-purchase-summary, periodic-expense-summary, credit-note-summary, sales-cost-margin, sale-inventory-movement, purchase-inventory-movement, analysis-anomalous-invoices, analysis-anomalous-bills, analysis-cashflow-anomalies, analysis-gl-journal-audit, analysis-receivables-customer-risk, analysis-cash-expense-health, statement-of-account-export.

tools.name: plan_recipe
tools.description:
Plan a transaction recipe — run a financial calculator and show what accounts, contacts, and bank accounts are needed. This is READ-ONLY (no API calls, no transactions created).
YOUR NEXT STEP after this tool: call execute_recipe with the same parameters plus startDate. The execute_recipe tool IS available to you — ALWAYS use it (not create_journal/create_invoice/create_cash_out).
Supported recipes: loan, lease, depreciation, prepaid-expense, deferred-revenue, fx-reval, ecl, provision, fixed-deposit, asset-disposal, accrued-expense, leave-accrual, dividend
Returns: capsule type/name, required accounts, step breakdown (journal/bill/invoice/cash-in/cash-out), and full calculator results.
Use this BEFORE execute_recipe to verify requirements. Parameters vary by recipe — see recipe skill docs for per-recipe params.
CRITICAL: ALWAYS call this tool for ANY calculation involving: depreciation, amortization, ECL/expected credit loss, FX revaluation, lease/IFRS 16, hire purchase, loan schedules, provisions, deferred revenue, fixed deposits, or asset disposal. Never compute these manually.

tools.name: execute_recipe
tools.description:
Execute a transaction recipe end-to-end — run calculator, create capsule, post all entries in one call.
PREFERRED over manual transaction creation — replaces ~20 manual tool calls. After plan_recipe, ALWAYS use this tool (not create_journal/create_invoice/create_cash_out).
Supported recipes: loan, lease, depreciation, prepaid-expense, deferred-revenue, fx-reval, ecl, provision, fixed-deposit, asset-disposal, accrued-expense, leave-accrual, dividend
Requires startDate (to generate blueprint with dated steps).
Auto-resolves accounts from chart of accounts. Provide bankAccountName for recipes with cash-in/cash-out steps, contactName for recipes with invoice/bill steps.

tools.name: create_scheduled_journal
tools.description:
Create a scheduled (recurring) journal. CRITICAL:
- Use schedulerEntries (NOT journalEntries) — each needs accountResourceId, amount, type (DEBIT/CREDIT), name.
- Use repeat (NOT frequency/interval): WEEKLY, MONTHLY, QUARTERLY, YEARLY.
- Total debits MUST equal total credits.
- Flat structure — reference, valueDate, saveAsDraft at top level (not nested).
Dynamic strings for reference/name/notes: {{Day}}, {{Date}}, {{Date+X}}, {{DateRange:X}}, {{Month}}, {{Month+X}}, {{MonthRange:X}}, {{Year}}, {{Year+X}} — replaced with values relative to the transaction date.

tools.name: create_scheduled_invoice
tools.description:
Create a scheduled (recurring) invoice. Use for fixed-amount recurring invoices where you want full control over currency, tax, and line items each period.
DIFFERENT from subscriptions: no proration, but currency/tax/items can differ per occurrence.
CRITICAL:
- saveAsDraft MUST be false (API rejects INVALID_SALE_STATUS otherwise).
- Use repeat (NOT frequency/interval): WEEKLY, MONTHLY, QUARTERLY, YEARLY.
- Each lineItem needs name, unitPrice, quantity, accountResourceId.
Dynamic strings for reference/name/notes: {{Day}}, {{Date}}, {{Date+X}}, {{DateRange:X}}, {{Month}}, {{Month+X}}, {{MonthRange:X}}, {{Year}}, {{Year+X}} — replaced with values relative to the transaction date.

tools.name: create_scheduled_bill
tools.description:
Create a scheduled (recurring) bill. CRITICAL:
- saveAsDraft MUST be false (API rejects INVALID_PURCHASE_STATUS otherwise).
- Use repeat (NOT frequency/interval): WEEKLY, MONTHLY, QUARTERLY, YEARLY.
- Each lineItem needs name, unitPrice, quantity, accountResourceId.
Dynamic strings for reference/name/notes: {{Day}}, {{Date}}, {{Date+X}}, {{DateRange:X}}, {{Month}}, {{Month+X}}, {{MonthRange:X}}, {{Year}}, {{Year+X}} — replaced with values relative to the transaction date.

tools.name: update_journal
tools.description: Update an existing journal entry. Can modify reference, valueDate, entries, notes. Set saveAsDraft=false to finalize.

tools.name: import_bank_statement
tools.description: Import a bank statement from URL or attachment ID. Processing is async — check magic workflows for status.

tools.name: add_bank_records
tools.description:
Create bank statement entries via JSON POST (1-100 records per call). For CSV/OFX file imports, use import_bank_statement instead.

Fields per record:
- amount (required): positive = cash-in, negative = cash-out
- transactionDate (required): YYYY-MM-DD
- description, payerOrPayee, reference: optional strings

Returns {data: {errors: []}} on success. accountResourceId must be a bank-type CoA account (find via list_bank_accounts).

tools.name: create_bt_from_attachment
tools.description: Create a business transaction (invoice/bill/credit note) from an uploaded file using AI extraction. Processing is async.

tools.name: search_magic_workflows
tools.description: Search magic workflow tasks (BT extractions and bank statement imports). Filter by status, document type, date.

tools.name: get_magic_workflow_status
tools.description: Get the current status of specific magic workflow(s) by resourceId(s). Returns workflow details including status, document type, and results.

tools.name: get_attachments
tools.description: Get attachments for a business transaction (invoice, bill, journal, credit note).

tools.name: add_attachment
tools.description: Add an attachment to a business transaction. Provide sourceUrl (downloads and uploads as file) or attachmentId (links existing).

tools.name: delete_attachment
tools.description: Delete an attachment from a business transaction.

tools.name: fetch_attachment_table
tools.description: Fetch extracted table data from an attachment (OCR/AI extraction result).

tools.name: message_to_pdf
tools.description: Convert a markdown message to a downloadable PDF document.

tools.name: generate_month_end_blueprint
tools.description: Generate a month-end close checklist with phases, steps, recipe references, and API calls. Returns a structured JobBlueprint.

tools.name: generate_quarter_end_blueprint
tools.description: Generate a quarter-end close checklist. Set incremental=true to skip month-end phases (assumes months are already closed).

tools.name: generate_year_end_blueprint
tools.description: Generate a year-end close checklist. Set incremental=true to skip quarter/month phases (assumes already closed).

tools.name: generate_bank_recon_blueprint
tools.description: Generate a bank reconciliation job checklist — match bank statement entries to ledger transactions.

tools.name: generate_gst_vat_blueprint
tools.description: Generate a GST/VAT filing job checklist — verify tax transactions, reconcile GST accounts, prepare F5 return.

tools.name: generate_payment_run_blueprint
tools.description: Generate a payment run job checklist — identify outstanding bills, verify bank details, batch payments.

tools.name: generate_credit_control_blueprint
tools.description: Generate a credit control job checklist — chase overdue invoices, send reminders, escalate aged debt.

tools.name: generate_supplier_recon_blueprint
tools.description: Generate a supplier reconciliation job checklist — match supplier statements to AP ledger.

tools.name: generate_audit_prep_blueprint
tools.description: Generate an audit preparation job checklist — verify completeness, prepare supporting schedules, organize documents.

tools.name: generate_fa_review_blueprint
tools.description: Generate a fixed asset review job checklist — verify asset register, reconcile depreciation, check disposals.

tools.name: generate_document_collection_blueprint
tools.description: Generate a document collection job checklist — identify missing invoices, receipts, and supporting docs for the period.

tools.name: generate_statutory_filing_blueprint
tools.description: Generate a statutory filing job checklist — prepare corporate income tax computation, file returns.

tools.name: validate_invoice_draft
tools.description: Check if an invoice draft is ready to finalize. Returns missing fields, structured validation report, and ready status. Use before finalize_invoice to prevent errors.

tools.name: validate_bill_draft
tools.description: Check if a bill draft is ready to finalize. Returns missing fields, structured validation report, and ready status. Use before finalize_bill to prevent errors.

tools.name: validate_journal_draft
tools.description: Check if a journal draft is ready to finalize. Returns missing fields (accounts, amounts, date), structured validation, and ready status.

tools.name: validate_credit_note_draft
tools.description: Check if a credit note draft (customer or supplier) is ready to finalize. Returns missing fields, structured validation, and ready status.

tools.name: list_bank_rules
tools.description: List bank reconciliation rules (action shortcuts). Shows rule name, action type, and target bank account.

tools.name: get_bank_rule
tools.description: Get full bank rule details including configuration (allocation percentages, accounts, tax settings).

tools.name: search_bank_rules
tools.description: Search bank rules by name or action type.

tools.name: create_bank_rule
tools.description:
Create a bank reconciliation rule. Rules auto-match bank records to transactions during reconciliation. When the user asks to create a bank rule, use this tool directly — do not only list existing rules.
- appliesToReconciliationAccount: the bank account UUID this rule applies to (NOT "ResourceId" suffix)
- configuration MUST be nested under reconcileWithDirectCashEntry key
- configuration.reconcileWithDirectCashEntry.reference is REQUIRED (omitting causes error)
- amountAllocationType: "PERCENTAGE" or "FIXED". Do NOT send "FIXED_AND_PERCENTAGE" — include both arrays and the server infers it.
- Optional: contactResourceId (pre-fills contact on created DCE), internalNotes, currencySettings, taxCurrencySettings
Minimum payload: { reconcileWithDirectCashEntry: { amountAllocationType: "PERCENTAGE", reference: "{{bankReference}}", percentageAllocation: [{ organizationAccountResourceId: "<acct>", amount: 100 }] } }
Full payload: { reconcileWithDirectCashEntry: { amountAllocationType: "PERCENTAGE", reference: "{{bankPayee}} - {{bankDescription}}", percentageAllocation: [...], fixedAllocation: [...], contactResourceId: "<uuid>", internalNotes: "Auto-reconciled", tags: ["auto"], taxInclusion: false, taxVatApplicable: false } }
Dynamic strings for name/reference: {{bankReference}} (e.g., INV-03/01/2025-01), {{bankPayee}} (e.g., Fruit Planet), {{bankDescription}} (e.g., QR Payment) — replaced with actual bank record values during reconciliation.

tools.name: update_bank_rule
tools.description: Update an existing bank reconciliation rule. FULL REPLACEMENT — the API replaces the entire rule on update. You MUST provide the complete configuration, appliesToReconciliationAccount, and name every time. Use get_bank_rule first to read the current state, merge your changes, then call this tool with the full payload. Dynamic strings: {{bankReference}}, {{bankPayee}}, {{bankDescription}}.

tools.name: delete_bank_rule
tools.description: Delete a bank reconciliation rule.

tools.name: view_auto_reconciliation
tools.description: Generate auto-reconciliation recommendations for a bank account. Returns magic match suggestions.

tools.name: universal_search
tools.description: Search across all entity types (contacts, invoices, bills, credit notes, journals, items, capsules) in one call. Returns categorized results. For filtering by tags, dates, amounts, or status, use the specific search tools (search_cashflow_transactions, search_invoices, search_journals, etc.) instead — they support structured filters.

tools.name: list_fixed_assets
tools.description: List fixed assets. Returns name, reference, type, category, status, purchase amount, net book value.

tools.name: get_fixed_asset
tools.description: Get full fixed asset details including depreciation schedule, accounts, disposal info.

tools.name: search_fixed_assets
tools.description: Search fixed assets by name, reference, type, status, or category.

tools.name: create_fixed_asset
tools.description:
Register a fixed asset linked to an existing purchase transaction (bill or journal).
- saveAsDraft defaults to true. Set to false to activate — requires ALL fields below.
- ACTIVE assets require: purchaseBusinessTransactionType + purchaseBusinessTransactionResourceId
  (links to the bill/journal that recorded the purchase).
- For standalone asset entry (no linked transaction), use transfer_fixed_asset instead.

tools.name: update_fixed_asset
tools.description: Update an existing fixed asset (draft or active). Can update name, depreciation settings, notes.

tools.name: delete_fixed_asset
tools.description: Delete a draft fixed asset. Cannot delete active/disposed assets.

tools.name: discard_fixed_asset
tools.description: Discard (write off) a fixed asset. Records the disposal and final depreciation.

tools.name: mark_fixed_asset_sold
tools.description: Mark a fixed asset as sold. Links to the sale transaction and records gain/loss. When the user asks to sell an asset, use this tool directly — retrieve the asset first with list_fixed_assets or search_fixed_assets to get the resourceId.

tools.name: transfer_fixed_asset
tools.description: Transfer a fixed asset to a different asset type/account, OR create a standalone asset entry (no linked purchase transaction needed). Creates a new asset registration from an existing one.

tools.name: undo_fixed_asset_disposal
tools.description: Undo a fixed asset disposal (discard or sale). Restores the asset to active status. When the user asks to reverse or undo a disposal, use this tool directly.

tools.name: list_subscriptions
tools.description: List recurring subscriptions. Returns status, interval, next schedule date, amount, transaction type.

tools.name: get_subscription
tools.description: Get full subscription details including line items, schedule, and payment history.

tools.name: create_subscription
tools.description:
Create a subscription — auto-generates invoices on schedule with proration.
DIFFERENT from scheduled invoices: subscriptions auto-prorate partial periods (credit notes for mid-period changes), but currency/tax/account are immutable after creation.
Use for: software licenses, retainer services, recurring SaaS billing. Invoices only (no bills).
- accountResourceId and taxProfileResourceId apply to ALL line items (same for all — immutable after creation)
- interval: "WEEKLY", "MONTHLY", "QUARTERLY", "YEARLY"
- reference is REQUIRED (API rejects without it)
Dynamic strings for reference/line item name/notes: {{Day}}, {{Date}}, {{Date+X}}, {{DateRange:X}}, {{Month}}, {{Month+X}}, {{MonthRange:X}}, {{Year}}, {{Year+X}} — replaced with values relative to the transaction date (e.g., {{Month}} → "March", {{Date+7}} → "16 Mar 2026").

tools.name: update_subscription
tools.description: Update an existing subscription (interval, end date, or transaction template). When the user asks to update a subscription, use this tool directly. NOTE: accountResourceId and taxProfileResourceId on line items are immutable after creation — to change them, cancel and recreate.

tools.name: delete_subscription
tools.description: Delete a subscription. Removes the recurring schedule.

tools.name: cancel_subscription
tools.description: Cancel an active subscription. Prorates remaining period and stops future billing. Safe to call — subscriptions can be reactivated after cancellation. Always use this tool when the user asks to cancel a subscription. Must cancel before delete.

tools.name: search_scheduled_transactions
tools.description: Search all scheduled transactions (subscriptions, scheduled invoices/bills/journals). Filter by type, status, date range.

tools.name: generate_vat_ledger
tools.description: Generate VAT/GST ledger report showing all tax transactions for the period.

tools.name: generate_equity_movement
tools.description: Generate equity movement report (statement of changes in equity).

tools.name: generate_bank_balance_summary
tools.description: Generate bank balance summary report — snapshot of all bank account balances at a point in time.

tools.name: generate_bank_recon_summary
tools.description: Generate bank reconciliation summary for a specific bank account. Essential for month-end close — call this for each in-scope bank account for the current entity and reporting period. Use for bank recon status, unreconciled items count, or reconciliation summaries.

tools.name: generate_bank_recon_details
tools.description: Generate detailed bank reconciliation report showing matched/unmatched items.

tools.name: generate_fa_summary
tools.description: Generate fixed assets summary report grouped by account, type, category, or status.

tools.name: generate_fa_recon_summary
tools.description: Generate fixed assets reconciliation summary — reconciles asset register with general ledger.

tools.name: generate_ar_report
tools.description: Generate accounts receivable aging report. Shows outstanding invoices grouped by aging buckets. Use this when discussing customer payment allocation, credit control, or AR status — generate the report to show the full picture.

tools.name: get_ledger_highlights
tools.description: Get ledger highlights — summary metadata about the org general ledger: transaction counts by type, date range, active accounts, active currencies, and cross-currency detection. No parameters needed.

tools.name: list_contact_groups
tools.description: List contact groups with their associated contacts. Used to segment customers/suppliers.

tools.name: get_contact_group
tools.description: Get contact group details including all associated contacts.

tools.name: search_contact_groups
tools.description: Search contact groups by name.

tools.name: create_contact_group
tools.description: Create a new contact group for segmenting contacts (e.g., "VIP Customers", "Government", "Overdue > 90 Days").

tools.name: update_contact_group
tools.description: Update a contact group name or members. NOTE: Update endpoint has a known 500 bug on some orgs — retry or recreate if it fails.

tools.name: delete_contact_group
tools.description: Delete a contact group. Does not delete the contacts themselves.

tools.name: list_custom_fields
tools.description: List custom fields defined for the organization. Custom fields add extra data to invoices, bills, credit notes, and payments.

tools.name: get_custom_field
tools.description: Get a custom field by resourceId. Returns full definition including appliesTo flags and list options.

tools.name: search_custom_fields
tools.description: Search custom fields with filters. Filter by customFieldName (contains) or datatypeCode (eq).

tools.name: create_custom_field
tools.description:
Create a new custom field. Custom fields appear on transactions (invoices, bills, credit notes, payments).
- Use appliesTo to control which transaction types show this field.
- printOnDocuments controls whether the field appears on PDFs.

tools.name: update_custom_field
tools.description: Update a custom field definition. Can change name, description, printOnDocuments, and appliesTo flags.

tools.name: delete_custom_field
tools.description: Delete a custom field. Removes it from all future transactions.

tools.name: list_withholding_tax_codes
tools.description: List withholding tax codes (industry classification codes for PH/SG compliance). Returns full list (no pagination).

tools.name: search_tax_profiles
tools.description: Search tax profiles by name or tax type code. Use appliesTo to filter by transaction type (e.g. "purchase" for bills, "sale" for invoices). IMPORTANT: When selecting a tax profile for a transaction, always filter by the correct appliesTo to avoid 422 errors.

tools.name: get_tax_profile
tools.description: Get full tax profile details including tax rate, type code, and status.

tools.name: update_tax_profile
tools.description: Update an existing tax profile (name, rate, or status).

tools.name: list_inventory_items
tools.description: List inventory-tracked items with stock details, COGS accounts, and purchase/sale accounts.

tools.name: get_inventory_balance
tools.description: Get current inventory balance for a specific item — quantity on hand, average cost, base unit.

tools.name: create_inventory_item
tools.description: Create a new inventory-tracked item. Requires itemCode, name, costingMethod (FIXED or WAC), cogsResourceId, and account links. Use --input for full JSON body.

tools.name: delete_contact
tools.description: Delete a contact. Cannot delete contacts with existing transactions.

tools.name: delete_account
tools.description: Delete a chart of accounts entry. Cannot delete accounts with existing transactions.

tools.name: get_cash_transfer
tools.description: Get full cash transfer details by resourceId.

tools.name: download_credit_note_pdf
tools.description: Download a customer credit note as PDF. Returns a file URL.

tools.name: get_transaction_summary
tools.description:
Get a complete summary of any transaction — fetches the transaction, its attachments, and payment history in one call.
Works for invoices, bills, customer credit notes, supplier credit notes, and journals.

tools.name: bulk_finalize_drafts
tools.description: Finalize multiple draft transactions in one call. Attempts finalization for each item and returns per-item pass/fail results. Supports invoices, bills, and credit notes.

tools.name: bulk_invite_org_users
tools.description:
Invite multiple users to the organization in one call. Accepts an array of user objects.
Each user needs: email, firstName, lastName, moduleRoles. Returns per-user pass/fail results.

tools.name: bulk_create_contacts
tools.description:
Create multiple contacts in one call. Deduplicates against existing contacts (exact name match).
Returns per-contact result: created, skipped (duplicate), or failed.

tools.name: quick_fix_transactions
tools.description:
Bulk-update multiple transactions of the same type in one call. Pass resourceIds + attributes — only included fields are changed, omitted fields are left unchanged.
Per-entity attributes:
- Invoices: valueDate, dueDate, invoiceNotes, templateResourceId, contactResourceId, billFrom, billTo, currencySettings, taxCurrencySettings, tags, customFields, capsuleResourceId
- Bills: valueDate, dueDate, contactResourceId, currencySettings, taxCurrencySettings, tags, customFields, capsuleResourceId
- Customer CNs: valueDate, notes, templateResourceId, contactResourceId, creditFrom, creditTo, currencySettings, taxCurrencySettings, tags, customFields, capsuleResourceId
- Supplier CNs: valueDate, contactResourceId, currencySettings, taxCurrencySettings, tags, customFields, capsuleResourceId
- Journals: valueDate, contactResourceId, tags, internalNotes, capsuleResourceId
- Cash entries: organizationAccountResourceId, valueDate, contactResourceId, capsuleResourceId, tags, reference, currencySetting (SINGULAR — { rateFunctionalToSource, exchangeToken }), taxCurrencySettings
- Sale/subscription schedules: endDate, interval, invoiceNotes, templateResourceId, contactResourceId, billFrom, billTo, tags, customFields, capsuleResourceId (+ currencySettings/taxCurrencySettings for sale only)
- Purchase schedules: endDate, interval, contactResourceId, currencySettings, taxCurrencySettings, tags, customFields, capsuleResourceId
- Journal schedules: startDate, endDate, interval, contactResourceId, tags, internalNotes, capsuleResourceId
Tags: string array (max 50 items, max 50 chars each), e.g. ["Q1"].
Response: { updated: string[], failed: [{ resourceId, error, errorCode }] }. On partial failure (HTTP 207), both arrays may be populated — always check failed.length. On 207, only retry failed resourceIds.

tools.name: quick_fix_line_items
tools.description:
Bulk-update line items across multiple transactions. Only included fields are changed, omitted fields left unchanged.
Request patterns by entity type:
- ARAP + accounting (invoices, bills, CNs, journals, cash-entries): pass lineItemResourceIds + attributes.
- Schedulers (sale/purchase/subscription-schedules): pass schedulerUpdates with arrayIndex per line item (Pattern C).
- Journal schedules: pass schedulerUpdates with lineItemResourceId (UUID) per line item — NOT arrayIndex (Pattern D).
Line item attributes by type:
- Sale (invoices + customer CNs): name, quantity, unit, unitPrice, discount, itemResourceId, organizationAccountResourceId, taxProfileResourceId, classifierConfig
- Purchase (bills + supplier CNs): same as sale + withholdingTax
- Scheduler (sale/purchase/subscription, Pattern C): name, description, sku, unit, unitPrice, quantity, discount, taxProfileResourceId, organizationAccountResourceId, classifierConfig, itemResourceId, withholdingTax (purchase only). Uses arrayIndex (zero-based).
- Journal/cash-entry: organizationAccountResourceId, amount, description, taxProfileResourceId, classifierConfig
- Journal-schedule (Pattern D): amount, description, organizationAccountResourceId, taxProfileResourceId, classifierConfig, itemResourceId, unit, quantity, pricePerUnit. Uses lineItemResourceId (UUID).
Response: { updated: string[], failed: [{ resourceId, error, errorCode }] }. On partial failure (HTTP 207), check failed.length.

tools.name: list_nano_classifiers
tools.description: List nano classifiers (tracking categories). Paginated. Nano classifiers tag line items with structured categories.

tools.name: get_nano_classifier
tools.description: Get a nano classifier by resourceId. Returns type and all classes.

tools.name: search_nano_classifiers
tools.description: Search nano classifiers by type name. Returns up to 100 by default.

tools.name: create_nano_classifier
tools.description: Create a nano classifier (tracking category). Provide a type name and list of class names. printable defaults to true (NOTE: printable: false is currently rejected by a server bug — always use true).

tools.name: update_nano_classifier
tools.description: Update a nano classifier — change type name, modify classes, or toggle printable.

tools.name: delete_nano_classifier
tools.description: Delete a nano classifier.

tools.name: list_invoice_payments
tools.description: List all payments recorded against an invoice. Returns payment records with amounts, dates, and methods.

tools.name: list_invoice_credits
tools.description: List all credit notes applied to an invoice.

tools.name: reverse_invoice_credit
tools.description: Reverse (unapply) a credit note from an invoice. The credit note becomes UNAPPLIED again.

tools.name: list_bill_payments
tools.description: List all payments recorded against a bill. Returns payment records with amounts, dates, and methods.

tools.name: list_bill_credits
tools.description: List all credit notes applied to a bill.

tools.name: reverse_bill_credit
tools.description: Reverse (unapply) a supplier credit note from a bill. The credit note becomes UNAPPLIED again.

tools.name: get_scheduled_invoice
tools.description: Get a scheduled (recurring) invoice by resourceId.

tools.name: update_scheduled_invoice
tools.description: Update a scheduled invoice — change schedule settings and/or the invoice template.

tools.name: delete_scheduled_invoice
tools.description: Delete a scheduled (recurring) invoice.

tools.name: get_scheduled_bill
tools.description: Get a scheduled (recurring) bill by resourceId.

tools.name: update_scheduled_bill
tools.description: Update a scheduled bill — change schedule settings and/or the bill template.

tools.name: delete_scheduled_bill
tools.description: Delete a scheduled (recurring) bill.

tools.name: get_scheduled_journal
tools.description: Get a scheduled (recurring) journal by resourceId.

tools.name: update_scheduled_journal
tools.description: Update a scheduled journal — change schedule settings and/or the journal template.

tools.name: delete_scheduled_journal
tools.description: Delete a scheduled (recurring) journal.

tools.name: get_payment
tools.description: Get a specific payment record by resourceId. Returns payment amount, method, date, and reference.

tools.name: update_payment
tools.description: Update a payment record — correct amount, reference, date, method, or account.

tools.name: delete_payment
tools.description: Delete (void) a payment record. The associated invoice/bill balance is restored.
